conceptually
ci/cd never touches the cluster directly. it only updates git. argoCD watches git and syncs the cluster.

workflow
push code>
CI builds image>
pushes to GHCR>
CD updates image in kustomization.yaml>
ArgoCd sees the Git change>
deploys to cluster

why?
- cluster stat is always 100% described by whats in git. if something goes wrong you look at git, not the cluster. ArgoCD is the only thing with cluster access
- CI/CD pipelines don't need kubeconfig credentials
